title: Auditor agent config
description: Configuration shape for the auditor agent. Consuming repos place this file at .github/agents/auditor/config.yml. Unset fields fall back to defaults.yml.

max_findings_per_pr.description: Hard cap on issues filed per PR audit. Extras are dropped (highest-impact kept).

neighbor_set_cap.description: Max files in the neighbour set (files referencing identifiers from the diff).

max_prs_per_run.description: Schedule mode only: cap on how many open PRs to audit per run. Most recently updated PRs are kept if the cap is hit.

dedup_window_days.description: Skip filing if a matching [auditor] issue was closed within this many days.

scan_paths.description: Paths the auditor considers in-scope when building the diff and neighbour sets.

skip_paths.description: If the diff only touches these paths, audit exits without filing anything for that PR.

labels.description: GitHub labels applied to filed issues.

per_category.description: Per-category label overrides keyed by category name.
